style_authority.note: Resolves adaptive native mobile, preserves the calm field-operations context, and separates shared product semantics from platform presentation.

reference_selection.note: Applies product, iOS, Android, adaptive window classes, motion-physics, accessibility, design-system, and validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Rejects the fixed identical shell and restores native Back, navigation surfaces, scalable text, semantic themes, controls, adaptive panes, and restrained feedback.

evidence_level.note: Labels the evidence L0 static and records the absence of source, build, lint, screenshots, accessibility trees, Simulator, Emulator, and hardware proof.

verified_boundary.note: Confines verified claims to supplied static facts and separates unobserved accessibility, windowing, theme, interruption, performance, gesture, and device behavior.

design_moves.note: Provides eight moves for adaptive structure, navigation and Back, size-specific surfaces, target sizes, scalable type, semantic themes, native controls, and accessible motion.

scope_control.note: Fits 147 lines with exactly five blocking findings and eight moves, maintaining native UI-conformance scope and decisive validation guidance.
